title: neoleretia philippinensis
intro: Neoleretia philippinensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae, specifically a type of orchid native to the Philippines. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Neoleretia philippinensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and extracts, are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
